violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and employee restroom(upstairs). Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves in basement ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (downstairs food prep area) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dishwashing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and dishwashing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
Signage is lacking at handwashing sinks in the restrooms near dining room. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
Bar is lacking a handwashing sink. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Last date of use were not written on the tags. PIC informed of proper record keeping. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed and unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The cutting boards in the (kitchen ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk in coolers door skirts) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The floors in walk in cooler(kitchen) observed with pooled water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The (floors ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed damage tiles exposing concrete floors. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dishwashing area and kitchen area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and dishwashing area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary) sanitizing solution for the (dishwashing). New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
The ceilings in the kitchen and walk in cooler(basement)area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2023

The ceilings in the kitchen, dishwashing, walk in coolers has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023
